overall.description: First-person gameplay footage walking through a tropical Caribbean-inspired town with colonial architecture, vibrant revolutionary murals, and vintage 1950s cars. The character moves from a residential street with a large mural building into a brick-paved pedestrian plaza approaching a historic church.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential street with large mural building

events.description: vintage orange and white car drives past from right to left

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the street approaching the mural-covered building

notable_agents.action: vintage sedan driving along the street past the mural building

entered.detail: multi-story residential building with balconies and red trim
building with large colorful revolutionary mural featuring a face with red star
overhead utility wires crossing the street

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sunlit tropical street with a tall apartment building on the left and a distinctive building with a large revolutionary mural on the right. The camera walks forward along the asphalt road as a vintage orange car passes by, with power lines visible against the blue sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: colonial residential street with covered sidewalks

events.description: turns left from the street onto the sidewalk
crosses the street toward the plaza entrance

agents.ego_description: turns onto the sidewalk and follows a pedestrian walking ahead through the colonial district

notable_agents.action: man in green jacket walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: historic buildings with balconies and terracotta facades
row of colonial houses with wooden shutters and balconies

segments.scene_description: The character turns left onto a sidewalk lined with colonial architecture, following a pedestrian in a green jacket. The mural building and apartment complex fall behind as the camera moves through a residential area with wooden utility poles and terracotta buildings, eventually crossing the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: pedestrian plaza entrance with church view

events.description: ground surface changes from asphalt to red brick pavement entering the plaza
silver vintage car passes close by, nearly hitting the character

agents.ego_description: crosses into the brick plaza and continues toward the church while a car passes dangerously close

notable_agents.action: silver vintage sedan driving through the plaza entrance passing close to the camera

entered.detail: historic stone church with two tall towers and arched entrance
large terracotta pots with tropical plants

segments.scene_description: The character enters a wide brick-paved plaza with a historic church visible in the distance. The ground transitions from asphalt to red tiles as decorative planters and benches appear. A silver vintage car passes alarmingly close to the camera as the character moves deeper into the open square.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic plaza with church and market stalls

events.description: turns left to explore the side street near the church

agents.ego_description: walks through the plaza toward the church then turns left to explore a side path with stairs

notable_agents.action: person in red shirt walking along the storefronts

entered.detail: twin bell towers of the stone church with arched windows
exterior staircase on the side building leading to upper level
shops with awnings and signage along the plaza edge

segments.scene_description: The character continues through the brick plaza approaching the church towers, passing by storefronts and benches. A pedestrian in red walks along the right side. The camera then turns left toward a side street with exterior stairs, moving away from the main church entrance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a sunlit tropical street into a wide, historic pedestrian plaza. It begins by moving along an asphalt road past a tall apartment building and a structure adorned with a large revolutionary mural as a vintage orange car drives by. As the camera turns left onto a sidewalk, the mural fades into the background, replaced by colonial terracotta buildings and wooden utility poles while following a pedestrian in a green jacket. The scene then opens into a broad square where the ground transitions from asphalt to red brick tiles, passing decorative planters and a silver vintage car that brushes closely by. Finally, the camera advances toward the towers of a historic church and passes a pedestrian in red before turning away from the main entrance toward a side street with exterior stairs.
